temporal_stability.description: First-half vs second-half mean CRPS across the SAME online run. Not a train/test split — the mechanism sees both halves in sequence. Use to detect drift, not to estimate generalization.

train_test_split.description: DEPRECATED alias of `temporal_stability`. Name preserved for backward compatibility; child keys renamed to first_half_* / second_half_* so they no longer falsely imply a refitted train/test evaluation. See `temporal_stability` for the canonical block.

online_block_mean.description: Windowed mean of a single online run, bucketed into K sequential blocks. NOT a prequential evaluation — no per-block refit of forecasters or mechanism state. Rename of legacy 'prequential_blocks' key; see .kiro/specs/model-training-testing-audit/.

online_window_mean.description: Windowed mean of a single online run, averaged over multiple randomly-placed evaluation windows. NOT a repeated-holdout evaluation — no per-split refit of forecasters or mechanism state. Rename of legacy 'rep_holdout' key; see .kiro/specs/model-training-testing-audit/.

sensitivity.note: sensitivity_sweep.json not found — run scripts/run_sensitivity_sweep.py to populate optimal_params and optimal_improvement_pct.

ARIMA(2, 1, 1).note: ARIMA.predict() returns the last observation; the fitted ARIMA model contributes only to the residual-bootstrap quantile fan, not to the point forecast.
